top_findings.summary: The CRUD Generator skill requests extensive system access (repos, infra, environments), credentials/access tokens, and architectural details that go far beyond simple code generation. While some context is needed, requesting production environment credentials, full system architecture, and compliance details for a basic scaffolding tool represents excessive privilege escalation and data collection beyond its stated purpose of generating models/endpoints/UI forms.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Permission Overreach & Data Over-collection - The CRUD Generator skill requests extensive system access (repos, infra, environments), credentials/access tokens, and architectural details that go far beyond simple code generation. While some context is needed, requesting production environment credentials, full system architecture, and compliance details for a basic scaffolding tool represents excessive privilege escalation and data collection beyond its stated purpose of generating models/endpoints/UI forms.
